long_description:
NRE were alerted of link issues between bbr02.cs01.wdc05 ae15 <-> XP XP. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19646
short_description: bbr02.cs01.wdc05 ae15, et-0/1/5 | Exchange Peering Link Flap
close_notes: Link is up and waiting for the RFO from provider
